log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Firbolg — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:14+6=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Firbolg — Bardic Musician HP: 59/67
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Firbolg — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:14+9=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Firbolg — Bardic Musician HP: 36/67
Frost Giant attacks Firbolg — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 29 damage. Firbolg — Bardic Musician HP: 7/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Firbolg — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
--- Firbolg — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Firbolg — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Firbolg — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:5+6=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Firbolg — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:4+9=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Firbolg — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 24 damage. Firbolg — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
→ Firbolg — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 6 vs DC 12]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
=== ROUND 1 ===

=== ROUND 2 ===
